metadata.description: Claude Project System (CPS) marketplace — on-demand installer plugins hosted in the CPS source-of-truth repo.

plugins.name: cps-installers
plugins.description: On-demand CPS install-time skills (cps-init, cps-setup). Installs per-project when bootstrapping a new Cowork folder or force-upgrading an existing one; stays out of global skill load the rest of the time.
